title: This 26 y/o 10x'd Revenue Doing the Opposite of Every AI Startup | Paraform, John Kim
summary: John Kim, founder of Paraform, argues that AI has made hiring recruitment noisier by flooding the market with low-quality outreach, increasing the cold emails needed per hire from 500 to 5,000. Rather than automate recruitment away, Paraform doubled down on human recruiters as the competitive advantage, paying out over $50 million to them and achieving 10x revenue growth serving customers like Palantir and Rippling.
